name: Benjamin Netanyahu
role: Prime Minister of Israel (2022–present; also 1996–99, 2009–21); ICC arrest warrant active
quote: Today, for the first time in 843 days, I can say: all our hostages are home. But our work is not finished — Hamas must disarm or be destroyed.

name: Itamar Ben-Gvir
role: National Security Minister, Israel; Otzma Yehudit party leader; draft ICC warrant reportedly prepared
quote: My right — our right — to live supersedes the right to movement of the Arabs of Gaza. There is no famine in Gaza.

name: Bezalel Smotrich
role: Finance Minister, Israel; Religious Zionism party leader; draft ICC warrant reportedly prepared
quote: There is no Palestinian nation. There is no Palestinian people. There is no Palestinian language.

name: Yoav Gallant
role: Former Defense Minister of Israel (dismissed Nov 2024); ICC arrest warrant issued Nov 2024
quote: We are fighting human animals and we act accordingly. I have ordered a complete siege on Gaza — no electricity, no food, no water, no fuel.

name: Benny Gantz
role: Opposition leader, Israel; National Unity party; Former war cabinet member (resigned Jun 2024)
quote: I left the war cabinet because decisions were being made without a clear post-war strategy — and hostages were not the priority they should be.

name: Isaac Herzog
role: President of Israel (ceremonial head of state)
quote: It is an entire nation out there that is responsible. It is not true this rhetoric about civilians not being aware, not involved.

name: Mahmoud Abbas (Abu Mazen)
role: President, Palestinian Authority; PLO Chairman
quote: We must have a fully independent Palestinian state on the 1967 borders, with East Jerusalem as its capital. This is our inalienable right.

name: Mohammad Shtayyeh
role: Former Prime Minister, Palestinian Authority (resigned Feb 2024); replaced by Mohammad Mustafa
quote: Israel is conducting a war of total destruction of the Palestinian people. The international community must act now.

name: Marwan Barghouti
role: Imprisoned Fatah leader; widely seen as most popular Palestinian political figure
quote: Palestinian popular resistance is not terrorism. It is the legitimate response of a people under occupation that the world has refused to liberate.

name: Dr. Ali Sha'ath
role: Head of National Committee for the Administration of Gaza (NCAG); technocratic Gaza governor under Trump's Board of Peace plan
quote: Our mandate is the restoration of core public services, the rebuilding of civil institutions, and the stabilization of daily life in Gaza. We answer to no faction — only to the Gazan people.

name: Yahya Sinwar (deceased)
role: Hamas military and political leader; architect of Oct 7 attack; killed by IDF Oct 16, 2024
quote: We have decided to pay the price for freedom and to end the occupation. This is just the beginning.

name: Ismail Haniyeh (deceased)
role: Hamas Political Bureau Chief; killed in Tehran July 31, 2024 in assassination attributed to Israel
quote: We extend our hands for a just peace. But our hands will remain on the trigger as long as there is occupation.

name: Mohammed Deif (deceased)
role: Hamas military commander (Qassam Brigades); killed Aug 2024; ICC warrant cancelled Feb 2025
quote: This is the day of the greatest battle to end the last occupation on earth. We have decided to put an end to all crimes.

name: Khaled Meshaal
role: Hamas Political Bureau; based in Qatar; led Hamas in exile during 2007–2017
quote: We in Hamas do not fight the Jews because they are Jews. We fight the occupiers because they are occupiers.

name: António Guterres
role: UN Secretary-General
quote: The ceasefire offers hope, but humanitarian conditions in Gaza remain catastrophic. Reconstruction will take decades. The international community cannot turn away now.

name: Francesca Albanese
role: UN Special Rapporteur on the Situation of Human Rights in the Palestinian Territories
quote: There are reasonable grounds to believe that the threshold indicating Israel's commission of genocide is being met. The facts on the ground speak for themselves.

name: Volker Türk
role: UN High Commissioner for Human Rights; issued Mar 2026 report on West Bank settlement expansion
quote: Israel must immediately and completely cease and reverse the establishment and expansion of settlements, evacuate all settlers, and end the occupation of Palestinian territory.

name: Karim Khan
role: ICC Prosecutor; sought arrest warrants for Netanyahu, Gallant; on indefinite leave since May 2025 after US sanctions
quote: We cannot have a world where the laws of war that protect civilians, hospitals, and aid workers apply to some but not others.

name: Cyril Ramaphosa
role: President of South Africa; his government filed the ICJ genocide case; Israel submitted counter-memorial Mar 14, 2026
quote: South Africa knows what it looks like when a government decides that a people are less than human. We have seen genocide before. We see it now in Gaza.

name: Joe Biden
role: US President (2021–Jan 2025); staunch Israel supporter; later pressured Israel on Gaza humanitarian crisis
quote: Israel has a right to defend itself against Hamas terrorism. We will stand with Israel. But we also need a humanitarian pause to get more aid in.

name: Donald Trump
role: US President (2025–present); brokered Oct 2025 ceasefire; chairs 'Board of Peace' for Gaza reconstruction; demanded Hormuz reopening as ceasefire precondition Apr 1
quote: We will consider a ceasefire when Hormuz is open. Iran's president asked us for a ceasefire — we said, open the Strait. It's that simple.

name: Philippe Lazzarini
role: Commissioner-General, UNRWA; agency banned from Israeli territory Jan 2025; now operating with 6 clinics in Gaza
quote: More than 200 of our colleagues have been killed. Our premises have been bombed. We are struggling to keep the humanitarian operation alive in Gaza.

name: Kaja Kallas
role: EU High Representative for Foreign Affairs and Security Policy (2024–present); formerly Prime Minister of Estonia
quote: Israel's barring of the Latin Patriarch from celebrating Palm Sunday Mass at the Church of the Holy Sepulchre is a violation of religious freedom. The EU calls on Israel to respect access to holy sites for all faiths.

name: Recep Tayyip Erdoğan
role: President of Turkey; severed trade with Israel; called Netanyahu 'Hitler of our time'
quote: Netanyahu — who has turned Gaza into a death camp — is no different than Hitler. He will face justice before international courts.

name: Mohammed bin Salman
role: Saudi Crown Prince; normalization talks with Israel paused after Oct 7; key regional actor
quote: Normalization with Israel without a credible pathway to a Palestinian state is not something Saudi Arabia can accept.

name: Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir
role: IDF Chief of Staff (2025–present); suspended reserve battalion over CNN crew assault in West Bank (April 2026); warned of five-front sustainability crisis
quote: I am raising 10 red flags before the IDF collapses into itself. Settler violence against Palestinians is morally and ethically unacceptable — and it is threatening our military cohesion. No soldier may assault journalists.
